---
title: "Phase-contrast imaging of multiply-scattering extended objects at atomic resolution by reconstruction of the scattering matrix"
type: "article"
author: "P. M. Pelz, H. G. Brown, S. Stonemeyer, S. D. Findlay, A. Zettl, P. Ercius, Y. Zhang, J. Ciston, M. C. Scott, C. Ophus"
year: "2021"
publication: "Physical Review Research 3"
preprint: ""
doi: "10.1103/physrevresearch.3.023159"
materials: ""
code_url: ""
project_page_url: ""
toc: false
categories:
  - atomic resolution
  - imaging
  - physics
  - journal article
# --- citation metrics (auto-managed; do not edit) ---
cited_by_count: 19
fwci: 4.81
citation_percentile: 95.8
is_top_10_percent: true
is_oa: true
oa_status: gold
counts_by_year:
  - [2018, 0]
  - [2019, 0]
  - [2020, 0]
  - [2021, 2]
  - [2022, 5]
  - [2023, 4]
  - [2024, 7]
  - [2025, 1]
keywords:
  - "Scattering"
  - "Optics"
metrics_updated: "2026-05-02T16:35:20Z"
# --- end citation metrics ---
---
## Citation (APA 7)

> Phase-contrast imaging of multiply-scattering extended objects at atomic resolution by reconstruction of the scattering matrix
P. M. Pelz, H. G. Brown, S. Stonemeyer, S. D. Findlay, A. Zettl, P. Ercius, Y. Zhang, J. Ciston, M. C. Scott, C. Ophus
Physical Review Research 3


## Abstract

[Abstract will be added manually]
